issues.title: Player defeated on floor 2
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 2 with 61.53846153846154% accuracy. Final encounter against venomfang (mini_boss), dealt 35 but took 19 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 62% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (78 cards played, 61.5% accuracy). All 6 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 61.5% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5
